title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: Flash is a framework for deploying Python functions to GPU cloud with a single decorator. It replaces multi-step workflows with hot reload and eliminates container rebuild cycles. RunPod offers both pod and serverless deployment modes with pay-per-second H100 pricing.
writeup: Audry Hsu presents Flash, a framework that deploys Python functions to GPU cloud through a single decorator, keeping the workflow inside the IDE. It replaces multi-step deployment with hot reload and removes the container rebuild cycles that slow iteration. The talk covers RunPod's two deployment modes, pods and serverless, with pay-per-second H100 pricing. The takeaway: GPU deployment collapses to a decorator, and faster reload changes the iteration loop.
